signup.welcomeSubtitle: Set up your account to clock in, view shifts, and complete daily tasks.
signup.welcomeProgressNote: You'll see your live progress after signing up.
signup.welcomeTermsAgree: By continuing, you agree to our
signup.accountSubtitle: Your manager will see your name and email.
signup.accountIdHint: Used to log in. Lowercase letters and numbers.
signup.accountPreferredLanguageHint: We'll use this to personalize content.
signup.accountEncryptedNote: Encrypted, used only for account verification.
signup.emailVerifySubtitleNotSent: We'll send a 6-digit code to confirm it's really you.
signup.emailVerifyReasonOwn: Confirms you actually own this email.
signup.emailVerifyReasonShifts: Your manager uses it for shift updates.
signup.emailVerifyReasonRecover: Used to recover your password later.
signup.emailVerifyFailedSend: Failed to send code. Try again.
signup.emailVerifyCooldown: Please wait a moment before requesting another code.
signup.emailVerifyFailed: Verification failed. Check the code and try again.
signup.emailVerifyUsernameTaken: This username is already in use. Choose a different one.
signup.emailVerifyEmailTaken: An account with this email exists. If it's yours, log into the app instead of signing up again.
signup.emailVerifyCredentialMismatch: An account with this username/email already exists with a different password. Log into the app to apply with your existing account.
signup.emailVerifyActiveApplication: You already have an active application for this store.
signup.emailVerifyNotEligible: You are not eligible to apply to this store.
signup.loginSubtitle: Already have an account from a previous application? Log in and we'll skip the account/email step.
signup.loginNoApplication: No application in progress for this store. Please use 'Continue with sign up' to start a new one.
signup.emailInUseBodySuffix: already exists. Log in to continue, or use a different email.
signup.statusHeadlinePendingFormWithFormTitle: You're signed up. One last step!
signup.statusHeadlinePendingFormWithFormSub: Submit your application to get reviewed.
signup.statusHeadlinePendingFormNoFormSub: The manager will reach out shortly.
signup.statusHeadlineNewSub: The manager will review and reach out to you soon.
signup.statusHeadlineReviewingSub: The manager is reviewing your application.
signup.statusHeadlineInterviewSub: An interview is being arranged. Watch for an email.
signup.statusHeadlineHiredSub: You're hired. Open the staff app to start working.
signup.statusHeadlineRejectedSub: Thanks for applying. You're welcome to apply again later.
signup.statusHeadlineWithdrawnSub: You withdrew this application. You can apply again later.
signup.statusHiredBannerSub: Open the staff app to clock in and view shifts.
signup.statusFailedSub: The manager has decided not to move forward this time. You can re-apply to other stores anytime.
signup.statusWithdrawnSub: You withdrew this application. You can apply again to a different store any time.
signup.statusCloseHint: You can close this page — we'll email you with updates.
signup.withdrawConfirmBody: Your application will be removed from the manager's queue. You can apply again later.
signup.completeApplicationBodySuffix: has been submitted. The hiring manager will review it and reach out to you. Once approved, you can log into the staff app with your username and password.
signup.completeDirectBodySuffix: as staff. Open the app and log in with your username and password to start your first shift.
signup.invalidLinkBody: It might be malformed or outdated. Ask your manager to share a fresh one.
signup.storeNotFoundBody: The store this link points to is no longer available. Reach out to your manager.
signup.signupsPausedBody: This store isn't accepting new sign-ups right now. Reach out to your manager.
signup.formInvalidFileType: "{name}" is not allowed for this slot. Accepts: {accepts}.
signup.formAcceptImage: JPG, PNG, WebP, HEIC · up to 20MB
signup.formAcceptPdfOrImage: PDF, JPG, PNG, WebP, HEIC · up to 20MB
signup.directBannerBodyPrefix: This link skips the applicant review step. You'll be added to
signup.directBannerBodySuffix: as a staff member immediately after verifying your email.
